# Christ Apostolic Church (CAC) Salvation Center

> CAC Salvation Center is a Spirit-filled Christ Apostolic Church assembly in Randallstown, Maryland (Baltimore area), USA, part of the Baltimore–Maryland District Coordinating Council. Sunday Worship is at 10:30 AM ET, in person and online. Everyone is welcome — "Welcome Home."

## About
- Full name: Christ Apostolic Church Salvation Center (CAC Salvation Center)
- Location: 10710 Marriottsville Rd, Randallstown, MD 21133, USA
- Superintendent: Pastor Dr. Hezekiah O. Ilufoye, PhD (Baltimore DCC Superintendent)
- Parent assembly: CAC Salvation Centre, Ilorin, Kwara State, Nigeria (established July 6, 1997)
- Languages: English, Yoruba

## Service times (Eastern Time)
- Sunday Worship: 10:30 AM (Sunday School 9:25 AM)
- Wednesday Bible Study: 7:00 PM
- Friday Service: 7:00 PM
- Daily Prayer Line: 5:00 AM

## Key pages
- [Home](https://www.cacsalvationcenter.org/)
- [About](https://www.cacsalvationcenter.org/about): Church history and mission
- [Plan a Visit](https://www.cacsalvationcenter.org/visit)
- [Watch Online / Live Stream](https://www.cacsalvationcenter.org/online)
- [Giving](https://www.cacsalvationcenter.org/giving)
- [Prayer Requests](https://www.cacsalvationcenter.org/prayer)
- [Ministries & Groups](https://www.cacsalvationcenter.org/ministries)
- [Events](https://www.cacsalvationcenter.org/events)
- [Leadership](https://www.cacsalvationcenter.org/leadership)
- [Resources & Store](https://www.cacsalvationcenter.org/store): Books, sermon series, and digital resources
- [Salvation City (sister assembly)](https://www.cacsalvationcenter.org/salvationcity)
- [Ilorin parent assembly](https://ilorin.cacsalvationcenter.org/)

## Sister assembly
- Name: CAC Salvation City
- Location: 8330 Pulaski Hwy Suite F, Rosedale, MD 21237, USA
- [Salvation City page](https://www.cacsalvationcenter.org/salvationcity)

## Upcoming events
- CACNA 2026 Annual Convention — July 13–18, 2026 at CAC Village, Blue Ridge Summit, PA
- Israel & Egypt Pilgrimage — November 2–12, 2026 (departing JFK, $4,795 per person)
- Good Women Anniversary — June 28, 2026 (in person, Randallstown)
